name: Suneet Patil
role: Solutions Architect – AI & LLM-based Conversational Systems
objective: Solutions Architect with \textbf{13+ years of experience} designing and scaling AI and LLM-powered conversational systems across voice-first and multimodal platforms. Proven expertise in production-grade architectures supporting millions of users, with deep experience in \textbf{NLP/NLU, LLM orchestration, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), and AWS Bedrock}. Strong background in customer-facing technical strategy, partner enablement, and delivering scalable AI solutions.

skills.items: LLMs, RAG, Agentic AI, Orchestration, Prompt Design, LangChain, LangGraph, Guardrails
AWS Bedrock, Anthropic Claude, Vector Databases, AWS Pinecone, Embeddings, Retrieval Pipelines
Voice AI, Chatbots, Voicebots, Multimodal, NLP, NLU, Alexa, Dialogflow, Playbooks, AWS Lex, RASA
AWS, GCP, Azure, CI/CD Pipelines, Serverless & Cloud-Native Architectures
Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, Java, REST APIs, Microservices Architecture, SQL & NoSQL Databases

experience.description: As a \textbf{Solutions Architect leading Alexa's third-party (3P) business in India}, I own technical strategy and solution architecture for partner-built Alexa experiences across multiple consumer domains, driving end-to-end delivery in collaboration with internal platform teams and external partners.
highlights: Owned and scaled \textbf{Alexa's third-party (3P) ecosystem in India}, providing architectural leadership for \textbf{20+ partners}, including leading brands across media, entertainment, kids & family, education, and lifestyle domains.

Drove \textbf{monetization strategy for Alexa in India}, designing reusable branded interaction patterns and supporting \textbf{45+ monetized campaigns}, generating \textbf{multi-million revenue} for Amazon and 3P partners.

Led the technical launch of \textbf{multiple core Alexa platform capabilities}, enabling discoverability, monetization, automation, and voice-based commerce workflows for scalable third-party adoption.

Designed and deployed \textbf{two production-grade LLM/Agentic systems on AWS Bedrock}, implementing \textbf{end-to-end RAG pipelines} over structured and unstructured data with strict validation, observability, and cost controls. Built orchestration workflows with tool-calling, state management, and graceful failure handling to ensure reliability at scale.

experience.description: As an \textbf{AI Lead}, I owned the architecture and delivery of an enterprise conversational AI platform, driving solution design and framework development across cloud environments in close collaboration with business and engineering teams.
highlights: Owned the solution architecture and delivery of an \textbf{enterprise-grade conversational AI platform}, building scalable chat and voice assistants across multiple industries.

Designed \textbf{conversational AI frameworks} across \textbf{3 cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure) and self-hosted environments}, enabling cross-platform deployments using \textbf{Dialogflow, AWS Lex, MS Bot Framework \& RASA}
Delivered \textbf{15+ production-ready conversational AI solutions}, including intelligent assistants and multimodal experiences, supporting customer engagement and internal enterprise use cases

experience.description: Worked on \textbf{enterprise policy verification systems for a US healthcare client}, supporting manual and automated applications and integrating with external carrier platforms using standards-based EDI.
highlights: \textbf{Automated end-to-end policy verification workflows} using industry-standard EDI integrations, reducing manual effort while improving data accuracy, turnaround time, and operational reliability.

education.institution: Ballari Institute of Technology & Management, Ballari

awards.title: Alexa Champion
awards.institution: Selected by \textbf{Amazon for technical leadership}, ecosystem contribution, and community advocacy in voice-first technologies.

awards.title: Alexa Community Builder & Evangelist
awards.institution: Led community-building and evangelism efforts for \textbf{Alexa in India, engaging 17K+ developers} across Bengaluru and national chapters through events, workshops, and voice-first initiatives

awards.title: Hackathon Winner
awards.institution: Won multiple national and corporate hackathons, including \textbf{Code Gladiators, Amazon, Microsoft, UNISYS, and TechUtsav (2015, 2019, 2021)}.

awards.title: Conference Speaker
awards.institution: Presented \textbf{15+ sessions} at leading academic and developer forums, including \textbf{IITs, AWS Educate, and Women Who Code}, focused on conversational AI and voice platforms.
